label: scam
text: Sir I am calling from C B I head office. A parcel in your name has narcotics and a w-a-r-r-a-n-t is issued. Do not tell anyone, stay on the line, transfer the funds to the safe a/c for verification.

label: scam
text: Aapke naam se courier me maal pakda gaya hai, giraftaari ka warrant nikla hai. Kisi ko mat batana, camera chaalu rakho. Verification ke liye paise safe account me transfer kar do abhi.

label: scam
text: Your aadhaar is linked to m0ney-laundering. Cyber cell has issued an F.I.R. Pay the verification deposit right now or the arrest team reaches today.

label: scam
text: custms dept here: parcl in ur name has ilegal itms, u r under digitl arest, share ur scren for netbankng verificaton and keep the otp redy.

label: scam
text: T.R.A.I notice: your SIM will be deactivated, it was used in a crimnal case. Keep the camra on for the video statement and pay a refundble security deposit to avoid blocking.

label: scam
text: I recorded you on the video call last night. If you don't want me to send it to all your contacts, pay ten thousand to this UPI within one hour.

label: scam
text: You took a loan on our app and missed the date. Pay now or we message every contact in your phone that you are a fraud and a defaulter. This is your final warning.

label: scam
text: Congratulations, you are selected for a work-from-home job. There is a small refundable registration fee of 1999 to confirm your seat, adjusted in your first salary. Pay today before the slot closes.

label: scam
text: Sir aapka bijli payment fail ho gaya lekin paisa cut gaya. Refund ke liye main aapke UPI app pe ek request bhej raha hoon, usse accept kar lijiye taaki paisa wapas aa jaye.

label: scam
text: Papa main bol raha hoon, mera accident ho gaya aur main police station me hoon. Jaldi se is number pe pachaas hazaar bhej do, aur mummy ko mat batana wo ghabra jayegi.

label: scam
text: I am from Paytm customer care. Your KYC failed and the wallet is frozen. Please download the assist app I send and share your screen so I can fix it for you.

label: scam
text: Hello sir, main SBI se bol raha hoon. Aapka account block ho jayega agar KYC update nahi hua. Main ek link bhej raha hoon, usme apna card number aur CVV daal dijiye jaldi.

label: scam
text: Aapko lottery lagi hai pachchees lakh ki. Bas processing fee aur GST ke paanch hazaar bhar do, phir puri amount aapke account me aa jayegi. Jaldi karo offer aaj tak hai.

label: scam
text: Beta main bank manager bol raha hoon, tumhare account me suspicious activity hai. Mujhe abhi wo number batao jo message me aaya hai warna account hamesha ke liye freeze ho jayega.

label: scam
text: Good evening, I'm from the bank's relationship team. No urgency at all, just a routine profile update. Whenever it is convenient, I'll help you re-verify your details through a quick secure link I can share.

label: scam
text: Hello, a courtesy call from your insurance advisor. Your policy has a pending benefit I can help you claim. We can take it slowly, there's just a small verification payment needed to release the amount to you.

label: benign
text: Your OTP for the Flipkart order is 4471. Do not share it with anyone. This is an automated message, please do not reply.

label: benign
text: Hello, this is your bank calling to confirm you successfully updated your registered mobile number today. No action is needed from your side, thank you.

label: benign
text: This is the delivery executive, your cash-on-delivery parcel is 499 rupees. I'm at your gate, please come down with the payment when you can.

label: benign
text: Namaste, aapke loan ki EMI kal due hai, kripya samay par payment kar dijiye. Yah aapke registered bank se ek reminder hai, dhanyavaad.

label: benign
text: Hi, calling from the clinic. Your payment of 1200 for the blood test was received, and your reports will be ready by tomorrow evening.

label: benign
text: Sir main society ka secretary bol raha hoon, maintenance ka payment pending hai. Aap online ya cash kar sakte ho, koi jaldi nahi hai, jab time mile.

label: benign
text: Good morning, I'm an advocate representing the opposing party in your property matter. Please have your lawyer contact our office regarding the next hearing date.

label: benign
text: This is the passport verification officer from the local police station. I need to visit your address to verify your details for your passport application. When are you usually home?

label: benign
text: We blocked a suspicious sixty-thousand transaction on your card. We will never ask for your PIN or OTP. Please call the number printed on your card, or visit any branch to confirm it.

label: benign
text: You are called as a witness in case number 45 at the district court on the 20th. An official summons has also been sent to your registered postal address.

label: benign
text: HR here, your background verification is complete and we will email your offer letter today. Congratulations, and welcome to the team.
